# 02.04-upgrade-onlym-slidemanager: Retarget OnlyMSlideManager and apply recommended package updates

# 02.04-upgrade-onlym-slidemanager: Upgrade OnlyMSlideManager

## Objective
Retarget `OnlyMSlideManager` to `net10.0-windows`, apply recommended package updates, and fix API compatibility issues.

## Scope
- `OnlyMSlideManager/OnlyMSlideManager.csproj`
- Related code in `OnlyMSlideManager/` required for build compatibility

## Done when
- Project targets `net10.0-windows`
- Recommended package upgrades for this project are applied
- Project restores and builds successfully
